reviews.review_title: Great game! Easy to lose hours with.
reviews.review_description: This game is a great modern take on the old Guitar Hero style gameplay. Perfectly adapted from a flat game into VR with added elements of gameplay and even a Mixed Reality mode. Feel like a game I'll be passing around during the holidays to share the joy of tooting with friends and family. It's easy to look at this and think kids game and it can be that but the gameplay is often alot more challanging than you'd suspect initally. If you're even slightly intrested give this one a chance to be a game you can grow to love.

crashes the whole meta quest 3 software so that only a hard reboot helps, not recommended

edit: i got to the dlc sektion, then an error occured, unclosable menus overlapped so that the only thing one could do was hard reset the headset

developer_response.body:
Hey Aeadraet, that's not supposed to happen and we want to help you as best as we can! Could you send us details of what happened here so our developers can take a look at it and assist you: https://tcvr.feedbear.com/boards/bug-reports.

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This game is a pure masterpiece crafted delicately by the hands of the trombone gods! All the fun of trombone without the lung compasity! Over 70 songs for 20 bucks! And endles coustom levels! I would pay 60! 10/10 🌟 🤩
If you have short hands like I do, the game will be 10x harder

developer_response.body: Hey buztap, thank you for the feedback! In case you weren't aware, you can also use wrist movements to compensate. Instead of extending your arms outwards in front of you, try angling your arms so that your inner wrist is facing you, and make a swiping motion front and back using your elbow as an anchor. Hope that helps!

reviews.review_title: Can I get a refund please
reviews.review_description: I was playing the game and it crashed and every time I get on it now it just sends me to a black screen and does not even let me play, So can I get a refund for my money back please.

developer_response.body:
Hey anthonyLeb, could you try launching the game again after the update and let us know if it's still crashing? If it is, please leave us feedback on our Feedbear board here with details: https://tcvr.feedbear.com/boards/bug-reports

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I played most of the campaign but nothing compares to the custom songs i played die in a fire and it was pure fun we need more music games like this cant believe i found this after a two months of being bored this is 100% worth it

developer_response.body: Hey Mickey_the_cheeseluver, thank you so much for leaving such a glowing review. Happy to hear that it's been a fun time for you!

reviews.review_description: The game will not install. It gets stuck at 100% and i have space on my headset, also no other game has done this before . But the game looks fun

reviews.review_title: My game crashed and now nothing works 😢
reviews.review_description:
Dear Developers,

I absolutely love this game. But my game crashed while I was trying out a ‘bone when my game crashed. I believe this was because a software on the vr itself was downloading and it hard reset it. So now it is showing none of my trombones and no songs. Developers I absolutely love this game, everything about it. But it you could please fix this I would be ecstatic. Thank you, and have a merry Christmas!

developer_response.body:
Hey finn.742031, could you try launching the game again after the update and let us know if it's still crashing? If it is, please leave us feedback on our Feedbear board here with details: https://tcvr.feedbear.com/boards/bug-reports

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This game is keep download and it is taking so long to download

developer_response.body: Hey AmyGlow, can you check to see if your headset has enough space? Have you also tried downloading other games and are you having the same issues?

reviews.review_description: Flat2VR studios have produced something truly obnoxious here. They should be proud if themselves. I legitimately hope the lord has mercy on their souls for what they've done here

American,  French, and everything in between. For those who come after.

Mixed reality is so cool in here.

Find the Clair obscur music and put it in custom songs at trombonedb

The game is fun at all, but like you have to play like perfect for the crowd not to like get mad and then when I seen it talks about it I seen all these cool songs now whenever I download the game, it was like none of the songs that were that were on the game, but like the game is really cool and all I just wouldn’t buy it again that’s what I’m trying to say like like don’t expect the TikTok’s that you see of people playing this song they don’t expect the songs because they’re not gonna be on here￼

developer_response.body: Hey nyasia2tuff, if you are looking for songs that the community is playing, you can watch this video on how to add custom songs into the game: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EPa58uP4PvI

reviews.review_description:
Every time i finish a song it says"do you want to save this video".
When i view the video it's a black screen.

Previously had never thought much about trombones, but I sure am now. I initially thought I’d be playing this with my kids more, but now I don’t want to share. Think a little nod at old school Guitar Hero. Really love the audience, they’re wild. Aside from that, there’s a Leaderboard where you can see your friend’s high scores. Super fun game, love it!
I have to say this really impressed me. Very polished, lots of tracks, and just super fun. If you ever liked any music game in the past then just buy it.
This game is amazing I can’t believe they finally made a trombome game on vr

reviews.review_title: Welp I WAS SKEPTICAL BUT THIS IS FUNNY
reviews.review_description: NASTY NOTE COLLECTOR. ..  DOES THAT MEAN I DID GOOD 🤣😂😂😂😂🥰

excellent way to learn!! also it's made as a wonderful game for any child, best way to learn and to have fun! excellent graphic as well!!

bvw: it would be great if it can works with real ptrombone as the guitar and piano apps works...

thank you very much!!!

I am trombonist it is amazing. I think it captured the right amount of slide position but it doesn’t go to six position fifth position or seventh position. It only goes up to second position first position third position in fourth position but I like how there’s on flattened and different challenges. I think it’s amazing.
It’s a really fun game if you want to play trombone or already play trombone, I play the trumpet and I also want to play the trombone and this is basically getting me started at playing trombone.

in this game u can learn how to trombone and it’s fun if ur even not trying to learn
ITS SO FUN I SPENT 7DAYS PLAYING THIS GAME IN A ROW
This game is a blast. Can’t wait for more content and can u possibly add more custom songs? Like pop music?

reviews.review_title: My favorite game out of them all
reviews.review_description: This is such a good game, and the trombone feels so good to play, and collecting different trombones is so cool, with the plunger being my favorite and being able to use the mods from the flat screen game is so cool
Never buy it

developer_response.body: Could you please be a bit more specific about your thoughts and reasoning? We would love to improve the game, but you haven't provided your actual thoughts on the game. What did you enjoy and not enjoy about TCU?

reviews.review_description: This game is an amazing adaptation of the OG trombone champ, and it’s still getting major updates!

If i could rate it 6 stars i would. This IS the greatest piece of media I have EVER come in contact with, the imaginative and creative minds behind this “game” should be more than proud at the masterpiece they created. This isn’t a game, rather a once in a lifetime, hell, once in a GENERATION experience. Before getting my hands on this experience, I was a nobody loser who just happened to be an avid Trombone player who was enticed with the prospect of playing the trombone in vr. After Experiencing this, I have become a wealthy entrepreneur, making many girlfriends (who go to different schools) in the process. Experiencing this masterpiece has genuinely changed my life, so i ask others: please, give this game a chance.

developer_response.body: Your review has changed our lives. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This game is great!  With so many fun songs to play and trombones to unlock there are hours of entertainment to be had.  Now that they’ve added the ability to download songs from the internet this game got even better.  It’s very polished and smooth.  I get a kick out of the crowd “booing” me when I start to flub some notes here and there.  Highly recommend this rhythm game to anyone that wants to have a good time in VR!

reviews.review_title: great vr version of an already lovely gm
reviews.review_description:
great game-love in every knook and cranny, constant updates, custom songs..what’s there not to love?

(not,really) easy to play, but hard to master..
fun game! :)

edit: how about a two player co-op mode?:)

This game really caught me off guard.  It feels like you are actually playing a real trombone as you slide your arm down to hit or not hit the correct notes.  If you miss the notes the game lets you know musically with an obnoxiously funny sounding noise.  This concept is perfectly suited for VR.  I love it gives you a mixed reality option too.  This game also teaches you about some music history too which is a plus.   I never thought a game solely based off of a trombone could be so much fun!

The mechanism of the game is kinda good. But some of the challenges are absolutely disgusting. Especially those challenges that need you to reach 150 profectos. Hope devs can fix this in future updates.

On the surface, this game doesn't seem like much. But it's surprisingly really fun and entertaining! I especially love how there's a huge library of songs, with an added custom level function! The customization options for trombones is a nice cherry on top!

This game is well worth the 10 bucks. Heck, I wouldn't have minded paying $20 for it!

I've only got one suggestion. Co-op/multiplayer would be great to have in this game. I'd love to compete with my sister to see who gets a higher score. Adding competition would bring extra fun and value to this game!
Fun game 🎮

reviews.review_title: Amazing VR Take on the Game
reviews.review_description: Awesome conversion to VR of this super fun title.  Always worth a good laugh and challenging enough to keep me coming back.

Rarely have I ever gave a game 5 stars, this is one that very much deserves it. I have played many games, especially music games in vr, this is by far the best and most fun one I have had the pleasure of playing. The closest I have ever had to a game hooking me this much was Pixel Ripped 95, and just like that game I played it for days straight and through many charges. If you like fun and silly games this is for you and if you're more of a competetive player this game's still got you covered with the ability to master each song and rise on the leaderboards. If you're still reading this review then stop and go buy the game if I haven't already hyped you up on it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review, we are glad to hear that TCU is ranked so highly by you and so many other fans alike. We are looking forward to seeing more of your toots in the future!

reviews.review_title: Hilarous, fun and cool, all at once!
reviews.review_description: Wasn't expecting too much, apart from all the high praises the game has gotten all around. But rhythm games aren't really my thing. One of the main reasons for that being the fact that they revolve so much around inner motivation of mastery. One of the pleasant surprises from the start was that in this game there are various systems that gives more visual and concrete feeling of progression rather than just mastery. Secondly, the failures in gameplay didn't feel as bad since the sound the trombone makes is anyways a bit weird. Lastly there's this cool experience loop with each song: first I literally laugh out loud when I hear the familiar song through trombone, after which I slowly learn the track and end up playing it more flawlessly at which point the song starts sounding really cool, the tracks are real bangers to my taste when played correctly! 10/10

I got this as every time I see somebody playing it on youtube it makes me laugh out loud! 

I grabbed it and after about 20 minutes I think I have had enough. Presentation is great, everything works as it should but the music selection is terrible! Add to that the game isn’t funny when you are playing it and not listening to it. At the end of the day it’s just too simple for me, same thing over and over and the purposely bad sounding trombone just ends up getting annoying rather than funny with the dreadful tunes you have to play.

Disappointed but i can see that for others it would be a better experience. I think i will just watch and not play from now on

developer_response.body:
That's fair. We try our best, but not everyone is gonna like every type of game!

Specifically about the song selection, the game does support custom songs out of the box. So you might be able to find something that's more your style. We have a video that explains how to get them: https://youtu.be/K_9HfoRQLZA

reviews.review_description: The game uses the same mechanics as the first one but makes it have 2 sliders which makes the game more better. Honestly this game was a complete upgrade to the last game they have created. The game has some… interesting things. But you will have a Blast!

This is going to become one of the STAPLES of the VR community. Fantastic game, amazing details, beautiful details, addicting gameplay. If you haven't bought it yet then GO DO IT! These developers deserve all the love that face toaster fans can throw at them!

reviews.review_title: You Can Do That With a Trombone?
reviews.review_description:
Trombone Champ is a game that’s simply fun. It knows what it is and does it well without trying to be anything it’s not. It’s a trombone game, there is nothing like it and I never would have thought playing the trombone could be so fun. Yet, here we are! There are so many different songs to learn and play, and every single one sounds absolutely ridiculous with your trombone.

Like any music game there are different difficulties, but you will want to start with the simple versions. They’re more fun and you’ll feel awesome when you can play an entire song with the crowd cheering you on the whole time. They will also boo you if you do bad. Higher difficulties feel impossible but can be done once you get the right rhythm down. You even get the chance to unlock new trombones, some of which can make different tones. Each song in Trombone Champ is more fun than the last, even some unexpected songs like La Cucaracha just crack me up when you use the right or wrong trombone tone. 

So, give it a try, you’re sure to have an awesome time with your trombone!

Honestly this game is super enjoyable. Comparing it to Beat Saber this game is less serious and more fun, but still gets quite challenging on harder difficulties and songs. I love that you can draw on the trombone to customize it. And even at release this game is super polished so do not worry about bugs.
Maybe I'll buy a trombone IRL to see how well the skills transfer

Holy smokes, what a game! This game was extremely impressive and fun to play. It gives you a perspective and gameplay that's unique and immersive! Immersive to the point I was forgetting about time, and I just wanted to keep playing and getting better. 

This game is a must-have, in my opinion, as far as rhythm based games are concerned. Fun songs, great use of customization, and trombones. Wish list it, buy it, tell your parents or spouse you want this, because this is a fun game to play and to show friends and family.

Its not my genre, and the game does a number on my brain. But that's a me, since I switch left and right as well. So moving forward to go down and back to get the note up quickly leads to hilarious confusion.

There are a lot of adjustments you can make to create a game that's enjoyable for everyone to play. Be it casual it competitive. The directions are clear, the music has a good variety and there is a wide  customisation for your trombone. (Sparkles!)

One of the adjustments I applaud, is that you can change to have the music tones coming at you form one or both sides. Finding that I can have it on one side helped me quite a bit.

Also the fact that you can add your own music to the game is a great touch. If you want to toot your favorite music, you can do so now. 

Its a funny game which allows you to laugh and not take yourself so seriously.
THE TROMBONE IS IN BASS CLEF NOT TREMBLE

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear the game didn't meet your expectations. If you join us on Discord, we can talk about how to improve the game together! https://discord.gg/A6ebFaXmYN

reviews.review_title: One of the best rhythm games I’ve played
reviews.review_description: This game is awesome, wonderful graphics, beautiful, bright and colorful. Amazing controls for the trombone so many songs to play. I’ve been playing it nonstop since it came out definitely check this one out. You’ll have a lot of fun.

I had the awesome privilege to play test this game! Even in the play test I didn’t have any bugs and I loved the game! Very fun and I could play it for hours! Definitely a must buy if you love music rhythm games!
I played out for like 10 minutes and I wanted a refund but I can’t get one

Dear developers

When I join the game and it says looks like we have a new trombone person and I try to select which hand I want to use it won’t let me do anything

developer_response.body:
Thank you for reporting this. You're supposed to use the laser pointer attached to your hands / controllers, aiming at the button you want to press, and then press trigger to click it. Is this not working for you?

Could it be that you accidentally pressed trigger on your other hand, which made the laser pointer change to that hand? Check with both hands to see which one has the laser pointer, and press trigger on the desired hand to move the laser to that controller.

We'd love to help more, you can join our Discord to talk to us directly: https://discord.gg/A6ebFaXmYN

reviews.review_description:
As a long-time fan of Trombone Champ, seeing it take the leap into VR is just incredible to see. A full-on trombone symphony of chaos, charm, and comedy.

A massive round of applause to the Flat2VR devs who managed to VR-ify Trombone Champ without losing an ounce of its signature fun.

I can’t wait to hear all the player stories, see the viral clips, and catch some hilarious live streams from this tromboning triumph. 

Whether you’re kicking brass or just making noise, this game proves there’s always time to trombone and chill. 🙌💙

5/5 Stars 🌟 – Tootally unmissable!

This game is hilarious, incredibly creative, and such a joy to play. It is a superb transfer from 2D to VR, and the devs should be so proud! Please get this game, it's fun for parties and solo play! You seriously won't be disappointed.
It's fun, quirky, and it allows me to live out my dreams of being a tromboner without the risk of becoming too powerful and dangerous with a real trombone. Definitely recommend!

If you are in to games similar to FNF, You will be in luck! This game is structured round about the same as the original game but in 3d where the game takes more spacial awareness AND also alot more sillies.

Since the game openly supports modding, turning any song into a wacky tuba solo is more than possible!

(Yes this means you can try playing Eminems "GODZILLA" on a tuba 💀)

Either way, it's an almost perfect game but it just needs some small QAL improvements but overall... 

It's a 4 stars for me!

It was great to have a lot of songs to choose from but I think it's going to take a lot of time before I can put on a great performance. The music was fun, but it wasn't great to listen to. 
It would be nice if the judgment difficulty could be improved to ensure that the correct note is played when notes are in similar positions. 
Thank you for making this fun game.
It’s amazing I can’t wait for more updates

Trombone Champ: Unflattened is a funny, addictive and well made rythym action game that took me by surprise.

I haven't got a musical bone in my body, so I wasn't expecting too much, but thanks to a clear tutorial I was quickly tooting notes from a wide range of tracks and after a few performances, the audiences jeers soon turned to cheers... 

There's far more levels than I expected and a wide selection of recognisable tracks with a variety of trombones which unlock quickly too.

Having already played for hours, I plan to return time and time again and thanks to simple intuitive controls it's a game my whole family will enjoy.

Very easy to recommend
5*

Simple, quick to learn and addictive

I initially launched this game without much expectation, but in the end I didn't see the time pass. The game is quite easy, there is a fairly wide choice of music as well as many different trombones.

I recommend this game if you want to play without any hassle.

5⭐
Amazing

Wow what a surprise! What a fun, challenging and well polished experience. I went in knowing little and have come out a fan, trombone champ is exactly what it says it is and delivers what it has set out to perfectly, climbing the leaderboards and learning the more and more challenging rinses keeps drawing you back in again and again. What a  tootarific experience.

Visuals 5/5
Sound 5/5
Content 5/5
Value 5/5

I really like this game, almost as much as I love Beat Saber. A rhythm game built around playing a trombone is such a fun and unique idea, and the colorful, over-the-top visuals make it even better. The whole vibe of the game is lighthearted and hilarious, which makes it a blast to play.
That said, I think the song selection could be improved. There are some really great tracks, but I was a little disappointed by how few there are. If they added more songs or made it easier to use custom ones, it would make the game even better. Still, the gameplay is so much fun, and the mix of music and visuals is super entertaining. I’m excited to see what they add next and can’t wait to hop back in! 🎺🎧🗣️

A casual rhythm game with engaging mechanics. The controls feel very nice in VR and there's a lot of customization for every type of playstyle! I would highly recommend if you like rhythm games and especially if you enjoyed the original!

reviews.review_title: One of the Best Rhythm Games!
reviews.review_description: This game is a blast! With tons of songs to choose from and plenty of trombones to unlock, it's always fun to play. I love customizing my trombone, and the competitive leaderboard keeps me motivated to improve. Definitely a must have for 2024!
